channel.title: Ipam on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Ipam on Pi Stack

item.title: phpIPAM vs NIPAP vs NetBox: Best Self-Hosted IP Address Management (IPAM) 2026
item.description: Managing IP addresses across growing networks is one of those tasks that seems simple until a spreadsheet starts conflicting with reality. When your organization runs dozens of subnets, VLANs, and DHCP scopes, a proper IP Address Management (IPAM) system stops being a luxury and becomes a necessity.
